name: Samsung Galaxy A17 4G LTE
description: Galaxy A17 offers essential features and practical extras designed to simplify your everyday life, all at an affordable price point. Featuring a 6.7-inch FHD+ Super AMOLED display with 90Hz refresh rate, Mediatek Helio G99 processor, 50MP triple camera with OIS, and a long-lasting 5000mAh battery with 25W fast charging. Built with Corning Gorilla Glass Victus+ and IP54 water/dust resistance for everyday durability.
aboutThisItem: 6.7-inch FHD+ Super AMOLED display with 90Hz refresh rate for ultra-clear, vibrant visuals and smooth scrolling
50MP main camera with OIS, 5MP ultrawide, and 2MP macro lens for versatile photography; 13MP front camera for sharp selfies
Mediatek Helio G99 octa-core processor (2x2.2 GHz Cortex-A76 & 6x2.0 GHz Cortex-A55) for smooth HD streaming, responsive gaming, and seamless multitasking
5000mAh battery with 25W fast charging keeps you going all day
IP54 dust and water splash resistance with Corning Gorilla Glass Victus+ for scratch protection
6 years of OS upgrades and security updates for long-term reliability
Circle to Search feature to identify items on screen; Gemini AI for smart assistance
Quick Share for seamless file transfers; Smart Switch for easy iOS migration

body.build: Glass front (Gorilla Glass Victus+), plastic back, plastic frame
